commit_message: fix(ai): detect z.ai context overflow (closes #1937) + docs(coding-agent): add changelog entry for z.ai overflow. Adds /model_context_window_exceeded/i regex to OVERFLOW_PATTERNS in packages/ai/src/utils/overflow.ts so z.ai's non-standard stop reason triggers auto-compaction, updates the context-overflow.test.ts z.ai test section to cover the new explicit-error path, and adds CHANGELOG entries to packages/ai/CHANGELOG.md and packages/coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md.
files_changed:
M	packages/ai/CHANGELOG.md
M	packages/ai/src/utils/overflow.ts
M	packages/ai/test/context-overflow.test.ts
M	packages/coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md
_verification_note: Auto-extractor failed because Dockerfile uses `git clone --depth=1 main` with no SHA pin (clones whatever main is at build-time, then synthesizes the buggy state by reverting model_context_window_exceeded pattern and #1937 CHANGELOG entries). The real upstream fix is in TWO commits (ade6a35e and 95d0806a, both closing #1937). Combined diff against their shared parent d48843ea captures exactly: (a) +/model_context_window_exceeded/i in OVERFLOW_PATTERNS, (b) z.ai test section update in context-overflow.test.ts, (c) packages/ai/CHANGELOG.md Fixed entry, (d) packages/coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md Fixed entry. Matches all test.sh gates that scan for the pattern + CHANGELOG entries in both packages. Note that base_commit refers to the upstream parent of the fix commits; the actual Dockerfile state depends on build-time main HEAD, but synthesis reverts are designed to leave files at this pre-fix state.

_review.note: Promoted from stub via hand_curate (combined upstream ade6a35e + 95d0806a). Round-2 r2-ah AGREE on content; numstat re-formatted to name-status schema.
